subtitle: A clinical decision-support calculator for estimating early postoperative infection risk after spinal internal fixation surgery.

WBC2.display: White blood cell count on postoperative day 1
WBC2.short: Postoperative day 1 white blood cell count
WBC2.plain: white blood cell count on postoperative day 1
WBC2.clinical_meaning: Reflects early systemic inflammatory response after surgery.

ΔCRP_2to4.display: Change in CRP from postoperative day 1 to day 7
ΔCRP_2to4.short: CRP change from day 1 to day 7
ΔCRP_2to4.plain: change in C-reactive protein from postoperative day 1 to postoperative day 7
ΔCRP_2to4.clinical_meaning: Reflects whether postoperative inflammation is resolving or persisting.

ΔD-D dim_1to2.display: D-dimer change from before surgery to postoperative day 1
ΔD-D dim_1to2.plain: change in D-dimer from before surgery to postoperative day 1
ΔD-D dim_1to2.clinical_meaning: Enter postoperative day 1 D-dimer minus preoperative D-dimer. This reflects the early postoperative coagulation/fibrinolysis response.

ΔESR_2to3.display: Change in ESR from postoperative day 1 to day 4
ΔESR_2to3.short: ESR change from day 1 to day 4
ΔESR_2to3.plain: change in erythrocyte sedimentation rate from postoperative day 1 to postoperative day 4
ΔESR_2to3.clinical_meaning: Reflects subacute inflammatory change after surgery.

ΔN%_3to4.display: Neutrophil percentage change from postoperative day 4 to day 7
ΔN%_3to4.short: Neutrophil percentage trend from day 4 to day 7
ΔN%_3to4.plain: change in neutrophil percentage from postoperative day 4 to postoperative day 7
ΔN%_3to4.clinical_meaning: Enter postoperative day 7 neutrophil percentage minus postoperative day 4 neutrophil percentage.

ΔPLT_1to2.display: Platelet count change from before surgery to postoperative day 1
ΔPLT_1to2.plain: change in platelet count from before surgery to postoperative day 1
ΔPLT_1to2.clinical_meaning: Enter postoperative day 1 platelet count minus preoperative platelet count.

disclaimer: This calculator is intended to support, not replace, clinical assessment. The result should be interpreted together with wound findings, symptoms, inflammatory markers, cultures, imaging, and the treating clinician’s judgment.
baseline_label: Average infection rate in the development cohort
